boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on batch ID - closure covers X-79 not X-78
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-XOR-078-P requires exact match on batch, assay, criterion, and date; CLOSE-XOR-078 covers X-79 not X-78
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Batch ID mismatch blocks release - closure must match batch X-78 per STD-XOR-078-P
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Closure must match batch, assay, criterion, and date before release - current closure batch X-79 ≠ release batch X-78

final_answer: The clinical batch release cannot proceed. The deviation closure (CLOSE-XOR-078) covers batch X-79, while the release targets batch X-78 per BATCH-XOR-078. The policy STD-XOR-078-P mandates an exact match on batch, assay, criterion, and date. The batch ID mismatch (X-79 vs X-78) leaves the source boundary open. Release is escalated until a closure covering batch X-78 is provided.
open_blockers: Batch ID mismatch: closure covers X-79, release targets X-78
Release cannot proceed until closure for X-78 is provided
